requirements.task_name: Request a quote for the cheapest DAF unit handling ≥50 m³/h under $80,000
requirements.task_description: Find DAF units, filter and sort, add the cheapest qualifying unit to the quote list, then open the quote list.

requirements.task_name: Assemble a basic treatment line for 30 m³/h within a $150,000 quote budget
requirements.task_description: Select one cheapest qualifying screen, dosing skid, and sludge dewatering unit for 30 m³/h; if their combined total exceeds $150,000, remove the highest-priced item.

requirements.task_name: Select a maintenance plan for an MBR system in Germany with ≤24h response under €6,000/year
requirements.task_description: Filter maintenance plans to Germany, MBR systems, annual cost < €6,000, response ≤24h; add the cheapest qualifying plan to a service inquiry.

requirements.task_name: Save a 2023 food & beverage case study treating ≥100 m³/day to the reading list
requirements.task_description: Filter case studies to food & beverage, year 2023, capacity ≥100 m³/day, sort by most recent, select the first result, and save it to the reading list.

requirements.task_name: Use the sizing calculator to select an equalization tank near 750 m³ and add it to the quote list
requirements.task_description: Run the equalization tank calculator with specific inputs (75 m³/h, peak factor 2.5, buffer time 4h), then choose the recommended tank series whose calculated volume is closest to but not less than 750 m³ and add the cheapest model from that series to the quote list.

requirements.task_name: Compare two pH neutralization systems under $40,000 and request a quote for the one with lower NaOH consumption
requirements.task_description: Filter pH neutralization systems to models under $40,000, select the two cheapest, compare them, and request a quote for the system with the lower NaOH consumption (kg/h).

requirements.task_name: Find the nearest industrial wastewater distributor within 200 km of ZIP 75201 and view contact details
requirements.task_description: Use the distributor locator to search around ZIP code 75201 with a 200 km radius for industrial wastewater treatment distributors, then open the nearest distributor’s detail page and view their contact information.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getDistributorDetails(distributorId) successfully finds a distributor (i.e., distributor is non-null), record the viewed distributor.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that after a search with zip_postal_code = '75201', radius_km ≥ 200, and market_segment = 'industrial_wastewater_treatment' (or equivalent internal value), the user opened the details for the nearest distributor. The nearest distributor ID can be derived as the first entry in result_distributor_ids for the latest qualifying distributor_searches record; this variable provides the actual distributor whose details were viewed for comparison.

requirements.task_name: Register for a June PFAS treatment webinar in the 10:00–12:00 time slot
requirements.task_description: Filter webinars to PFAS treatment in June (specific year), choose a session with a start time between 10:00 and 12:00, and complete the registration form with specified contact details.
